description_long: This is a modern record player with a rectangular black base and a transparent dust cover that is partially open. The turntable platter is circular and black, supporting a vinyl record with a colorful central label. On the right side of the base, there are several control knobs and switches, likely for power, volume, and speed adjustment, all in a matching black or metallic finish. The tonearm is visible, positioned over the record, and appears to be made of metal or plastic with a sleek, straight design. The dust cover is made of clear plastic, attached with hinges at the back, and provides protection for the platter and controls. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for placement on a table or shelf in an urban environment.
description: A compact black record player with a transparent dust cover, visible control knobs, and a vinyl record on the platter. The design is modern and functional, with a clear view of the tonearm and controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open transparent dust cover, the vinyl record on the platter, and the control knobs on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the partially open dust cover and the profile of the platter and record.
description_view_2: Rear view with the dust cover dominating the view, partially obscuring the platter and controls.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the dust cover, the tonearm, and the control area more clearly.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and black, occupying the central area of the record player. It is slightly raised above the base and supports a vinyl record. The surface appears smooth with a matte finish, and no distinct grooves or patterns are visible beyond the record itself.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, straight, and extends from the right side of the player toward the center of the platter. It appears to be made of metal or plastic, with a sleek, metallic or black finish. The tonearm is positioned over the record, suggesting it is ready for playback.
attribute_control_knobs: Several control knobs and switches are visible on the right side of the base. They are small, cylindrical, and likely made of plastic or metal, with a black or metallic finish. No specific labels or markings are visible, but their placement suggests standard playback controls.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of transparent plastic, and is partially open. It is attached to the back of the record player with visible hinges, allowing it to be lifted or closed over the platter and controls. The cover is colorless and provides clear visibility of the components beneath.
